mapper.select: select id, email, password, nickname, real_name, birth_date, bio, profile_image, banner_image, role, creator_verified, seller_verified, creator_tier, follower_count, following_count, gallery_count, phone_number, last_login_datetime, status, created_datetime, updated_datetime, deleted_datetime from tbl_member where id = #{id}

select id, email, password, nickname, real_name, birth_date, bio, profile_image, banner_image, role, creator_verified, seller_verified, creator_tier, follower_count, following_count, gallery_count, phone_number, last_login_datetime, status, created_datetime, updated_datetime, deleted_datetime from tbl_member where email = #{email} and status = 'ACTIVE'

select id, email, password, nickname, real_name, birth_date, bio, profile_image, banner_image, role, creator_verified, seller_verified, creator_tier, follower_count, following_count, gallery_count, phone_number, last_login_datetime, status, created_datetime, updated_datetime, deleted_datetime from tbl_member where nickname = #{nickname} and status = 'ACTIVE'

select id, email, password, nickname, real_name, birth_date, bio, profile_image, banner_image, role, creator_verified, seller_verified, creator_tier, follower_count, following_count, gallery_count, phone_number, last_login_datetime, status, created_datetime, updated_datetime, deleted_datetime from tbl_member where regexp_replace(coalesce(phone_number, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = regexp_replace(#{phoneNumber}, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') and status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: update tbl_member set last_login_datetime = now(), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{memberId}
update tbl_member set password = #{password}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{memberId}

update tbl_member set nickname = #{nickname}, real_name = #{realName}, bio = #{bio}, profile_image = #{profileImage}, banner_image = #{bannerImage}, phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from tbl_work where member_id = #{memberId} and deleted_datetime is null and status != 'DELETED'

select mb.id, mb.badge_id, b.badge_key, b.badge_name, b.image_file, mb.is_displayed, mb.earned_at from tbl_member_badge mb join tbl_badge b on mb.badge_id = b.id where mb.member_id = #{memberId} order by mb.is_displayed desc, mb.earned_at desc

select mb.id, mb.badge_id, b.badge_key, b.badge_name, b.image_file, mb.is_displayed, mb.earned_at from tbl_member_badge mb join tbl_badge b on mb.badge_id = b.id where mb.member_id = #{memberId} and mb.is_displayed = true order by mb.earned_at desc

SELECT m.id, m.nickname, m.profile_image, m.bio, m.creator_verified, m.creator_tier, m.follower_count FROM tbl_member m WHERE m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.id != #{currentMemberId} AND ( m.nickname ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR m.real_name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR m.bio ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) ORDER BY m.follower_count DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT m.id, m.nickname, m.profile_image, m.bio, m.creator_verified, m.creator_tier, m.follower_count, CASE WHEN f.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS is_following FROM tbl_member m LEFT JOIN tbl_follow f ON f.follower_id = #{currentMemberId} AND f.following_id = m.id WHERE m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.id != #{currentMemberId} AND ( m.nickname ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR m.real_name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR m.bio ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) ORDER BY m.follower_count DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT #{criteria.count} OFFSET #{criteria.offset}
